name: Osaka Station City Toilet
description: Public restroom inside Osaka Station City shopping area.
note: Accessible and open during mall hours. Good for quick stops.

name: Grand Front Osaka Restroom
description: Modern restroom in the shopping complex north of the station.
note: Easy to find near the central atrium.

name: Osaka Station Coin Lockers
description: Large locker area near the JR ticket gates.
note: Most lockers accept 100-yen coins and some IC cards.

name: Hankyu Umeda Terminal Coin Lockers
description: Lockers near the Hankyu ticket gate area.
note: Good option if you are using Hankyu line.

name: Umeda Trash Zone
description: Public trash collection area near the station plaza.
note: Open air / limited hours, separate burnable and cans.

name: Grand Front Osaka Trash Bins
description: Indoor bins inside the shopping complex.
note: Look for the recycling stations next to the food court.

name: JR Ticket Office ATM
description: ATM accepting foreign cards near the JR ticket center.
note: Best for cash withdrawals with minimal language barriers.

name: 7-Eleven ATM in Osaka Station City
description: Convenience store ATM with English menu.
note: Works well outside station gates.

name: Osaka Station Smoking Area
description: Designated smoking space outside the station.
note: Use only in marked areas to avoid fines.

name: Hankyu Umeda Smoking Space
description: Small smoking area near Hankyu gate.
note: Move quickly after smoking to avoid crowding.

name: Osaka Station South Exit
description: Major south exit near the station plaza.
note: Useful for leaving toward Grand Front Osaka.

name: Hankyu Umeda East Exit
description: Access to Hankyu department store and buses.
note: Good for traveling to Kyoto or Kobe by express bus.

name: Hankyu Department Store Toilet
description: Restroom on the 3rd floor of Hankyu Umeda.
note: Clean facility with changing table.

name: Umeda Loft Storage Lockers
description: Store lockers near Umeda Loft entrance.
note: Good for shoppers carrying luggage.

name: Mitsubishi UFJ ATM
description: Bank ATM near Umeda Sky Building.
note: Possible English menu with international cards.

name: Umeda Sky Building Trash Area
description: Trash bins near the building entrance.
note: May only be open during events.

name: Sample Demo Smoking Spot
description: Sample location for demo purposes.
note: Use this as a placeholder while testing.

name: Kita-Shinchi Exit
description: Exit toward the Kita-Shinchi dining area.
note: Good if you want to find restaurants quickly.

name: JR Osaka Station Restroom North
description: Restroom near the JR station northern ticket gates.
note: Ideal when arriving from the north side.

name: Osaka Umeda Station Baggage Lockers
description: Locker bank near the station information center.
note: Mostly medium and large sizes.

name: Hankyu Food Hall Recycling
description: Food hall trash/recycle points.
note: Only for food court waste.

name: Lawson ATM in Hep Five
description: Convenience store ATM at Hep Five shopping mall.
note: A good option if you are sightseeing around North Umeda.

name: OSAKA STATION CITY Restroom (South)
description: South side restroom in Osaka Station City.
note: One of the easier restrooms if you are near the shopping street.

name: Osaka Station Central Exit
description: Central exit close to the station malls.
note: Good for walking south toward Umeda Sky Building.

name: SMBC ATM Umeda
description: SMBC bank ATM near the Umeda Sky Building shuttle bus stop.
note: Convenient for travelers heading to business areas.
